hero.subtitle: Cx Assistant helps commissioning teams capture issues, plan milestones, and deliver faster with AI support.

chat.disclaimer: AI may make mistakes — verify important details.
chat.greeting: Hey! How can I help you today? 👋

chatTurns.userText: Hey! Can you tell me how many issues are open?
What is the serial number of the #NL_IRE33_L0_028_UPS1B01?
chatTurns.assistantText: The serial number of the #NL_IRE33_L0_028_UPS1B01 is 06-7M71593-01.

highlights.title: Everything in one place
highlights.subtitle: Structured, searchable, and secure project management tailored for the MEP and commissioning industry.

assetTracking.title: Asset Tracking
assetTracking.description: Track every piece of equipment from delivery to final handover with granular status updates and historical logs.

issueManagement.title: Issue Management
issueManagement.description: A robust "punch list" reimagined. Assign responsibilities, set priorities, and track resolutions in real-time.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Centralized repository for checklists, test scripts, and certifications. Auto-generate professional PDF reports with one click.

chatSection.title: Your project,
chatSection.description: Ask questions in plain language, create issues, update assets, and retrieve documents — all from a single conversation. No switching tabs, no searching through spreadsheets.
chatSection.bullet1: Query issues, assets & documents by name or tag
chatSection.bullet2: Create and update records with a single message
chatSection.bullet3: Read nameplates and attach photos on the fly
chatSection.bullet4: Retrieve FAT documents and certifications instantly

aiFeature.title: AI that understands
aiFeature.description: Don't just store data—understand it. Our built-in assistant parses your project documentation to answer complex queries, flag inconsistencies, and suggest resolutions based on project history.
aiFeature.feature2: Automated technical review of test results
aiFeature.chatUser: "Summarize the open critical issues for AHU-01 and tell me who is responsible for the last update."
aiFeature.chatAssistant: "There are 2 critical issues for AHU-01: 1) Fan vibration alert, 2) BMS communication timeout. Both were last updated by Sarah M. on Tuesday."

featureShowcase.sectionTitle: Built for every step of commissioning
featureShowcase.sectionSubtitle: From first equipment delivery to final handover — one platform, zero gaps.

dashboard.title: Command-center
dashboard.description: Monitor asset health, issue velocity, and schedule adherence in a single view. Spot deviations before they become delays.

assets.title: Every asset,
assets.description: Track every piece of equipment with color-coded commissioning tags. Filter, drill in, and access full technical specs and linked documentation for any asset.
assets.bullet2: Per-asset technical data and linked docs

issues.title: Issues resolved,
issues.description: A powerful punch list reimagined. Log field issues from photo or text, assign teams, set priorities, and maintain a full photo-rich audit trail.
issues.bullet1: AI-assisted issue creation from text or photo
issues.bullet2: Full audit trail with photo evidence

documentation.title: All your docs,
documentation.description: Upload, version, and preview FAT reports, test scripts, and certificates — all in one place with an inline PDF viewer and versioning workflow.
documentation.bullet1: Organized folder tree with version control
documentation.bullet2: In-browser PDF preview — no downloads needed

tracker.title: Know what's missing
tracker.description: Map required documents to each asset and track completion across L1, L2, L3, and Handover phases. Approve, link, or flag documents directly from the tracker.
tracker.bullet1: Per-asset completion view across all phases
tracker.bullet2: Link, approve, and flag in one click

blogPreview.subtitle: Deep dives into commissioning challenges and how we're solving them.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing for every team size.

items.question: What is Cx Assistant?
items.answer: Cx Assistant is a next-generation commissioning platform for complex environments. It combines a powerful management app with an AI assistant to automate tasks, enhance collaboration, and ensure flawless project delivery.

items.question: How does the AI assistant help engineers?
items.answer: The AI assistant automates repetitive tasks, links issues to assets, and provides instant answers to natural language questions. It helps engineers spend less time on admin and more time on actual engineering.

items.question: What types of projects is Cx Assistant built for?
items.answer: Cx Assistant is designed for data centers, industrial facilities, and critical infrastructure—anywhere commissioning is complex, high-stakes, and time-critical.

items.question: How does Cx Assistant support compliance and quality?
items.answer: Cx Assistant highlights missing signatures, incomplete fields, and mismatched IDs, ensuring compliance before handover. AI-powered validation catches errors before they become risks.

seo.homeTitle: Cx Assistant — AI Commissioning Platform for Engineering Teams
seo.homeDescription: Cx Assistant is an AI-powered commissioning platform that helps engineering teams manage issues, assets, and documentation — faster, smarter, and more consistently.
